creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text: On another contrary arrowd@ can you discuss with portmgr@ whether if this is actually a right time for this push or not? We have just split quarterly and some stupid people like me will be removing the share/man hacks and in case those needs to be merged quarterly it might break things. So waiting and doing this sometimes near the next quarterly makes sense to me. But yeah I leave it upon portmgr@ to decide and work on this.
